description: Fix portal test kesehatan not showing scheduled records due to userId mismatch between hrd_karyawan and hrd_users collections. Also add Test Kesehatan button to Aksi Cepat section in modules-portal.js.
steps: In loadPortalTestKesehatan(), add a third query that fetches all hrd_test_kesehatan records for tipe 'existing' and filters client-side by matching nama (case-insensitive). This catches records where userId was set from hrd_karyawan doc ID which does not match hrd_users doc ID.
In simpanJadwalTestKesehatan(), for tipe 'existing', also look up the hrd_users doc by name and store both karyawanId and userId fields so future portal queries work correctly.
In modules-portal.js renderPortal(), add a Test Kesehatan button in the Aksi Cepat section to improve discoverability.
acceptance_criteria: loadPortalTestKesehatan finds records even when userId is a karyawan doc ID (not matching hrd_users ID)
Staff portal shows test schedules that were created by admin selecting from karyawan dropdown
Aksi Cepat section has a Test Kesehatan button navigating to portal-test-kesehatan
verification: Grep loadPortalTestKesehatan for the name-based fallback query that handles non-empty userId
findings: Root cause was userId mismatch: admin saves hrd_karyawan doc ID as userId but portal queries using hrd_users doc ID. Fixed by leveraging currentUser.linkedKaryawan field which stores the karyawan doc ID on the user account. Added 4-tier query strategy: (1) by hrd_users ID, (2) by linkedKaryawan ID, (3) empty userId with name match, (4) tipe=existing with name match as last resort. Also added Test Kesehatan button to Aksi Cepat in portal.
